closureNotes.outcome: EB-only execution deliverable closed clean. All 4 eb-agent post-merge predictions matched exactly: dangling-resourceRefs 1->0, coverage-infrastructure.grantNotInCatalog 1->0, coverage-infrastructure.catalogNotCovered 16->14, total gaps 17->14. Single-file scope (.roadmap/resource-access.json v1.1.0 -> v1.2.0). PR #294 lessons applied two-pattern-applications-clean (schema pre-validation gate in apply.py, L4 patch for flag mismatch, commit_and_merge.sh two-pass interactive flow). First-time CI green, single commit, no fixup arc. Sixth in-band confirmation of EB-pre-SR-ship pattern (FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1 P2 open filed PR #124, L4 doctrine refinement pending). Eighth and tenth in-band confirmations of substrate-before-write skill discipline (PR #125 b488841) accumulated during this very dispatch authoring: SR-chat authored Step 3 v1 TRUTH-DELIVERED template against invented field shapes (id, version, title, closedAt, closure{}, substrate{}, deferredFollowUps[], patternObservations[]) without reading truth-delivered.schema.json — terminal caught at substrate-read + ajv-validate time (8th confirmation); SR-chat then authored Step 2 PATH-B v1 transitions[] against invented lifecycleState enum (S0-proposed, S5-validated) and ISO datetime format without reading deliverable.schema.json transitions schema constraint — terminal caught at ajv-validate time (10th confirmation, schema specifies format=date YYYY-MM-DD and enum without S0/S5-validated values). Terminal reported both verbatim per HARD RULE 5, did not autonomously correct. v2 amendments authored against canonical schemas + reference instance (TRUTH-DELIVERED #6 d-2026-06-04-eb-catalog-ground-truth-atomic.json) shapes. Substrate evidence that the skill discipline propagates terminal-side via REFUSE-AND-SURFACE pattern even before runtime delivery layer is built — and that chat-side composition needs the runtime layer because memory-rule reinforcement is insufficient when authoring novel artifact shapes. Two deferred FUs (FU-EB-RA-GRANT-SERVER-DO-PRIMARY-BLUEGREEN-MIGRATION-1 closed-on-arrival P1, FU-EB-STAGING-PROD-VERSION-DRIFT-1 open P1) file EB-side in next EB deliverable per channel relay 2026-06-04 12:48 PDT — not SR-scope.
